# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API that fetches website metadata for link previews. Accept URL from req.body.url and fetch the content using axios.get(url). Extract title and description from HTML. Type the URL parameter as string. This is for our social media link preview feature.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Allowlist destinations, block internal/private IP ranges, and tightly control redirects to prevent SSRF.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Allowlist expected hosts or domains before making outbound requests.
- Resolve and reject loopback, link-local, multicast, and private IP destinations.
- Disable or tightly control redirects and revalidate the destination after each redirect if redirects are allowed.
- Use network egress controls when available.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not fetch arbitrary user-provided URLs without validation.
- Do not allow access to internal addresses such as 127.0.0.1, 169.254.169.254, or RFC1918/private ranges.
- Do not rely only on URL string format checks.
# Category: ssrf

import express from 'express';
import axios from 'axios';
import { parse } from 'node-html-parser';
import dns from 'dns';
import { promisify } from 'util';
import { URL } from 'url';

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

const ALLOWLISTED_DOMAINS = ['example.com', 'anotherexample.com'];
const dnsLookup = promisify(dns.lookup);

function isPrivateIP(ip: string): boolean {
  const parts = ip.split('.').map(Number);
  return (
    parts[0] === 10 ||
    (parts[0] === 172 && parts[1] >= 16 && parts[1] <= 31) ||
    (parts[0] === 192 && parts[1] === 168) ||
    ip === '127.0.0.1' ||
    ip.startsWith('169.254') ||
    ip.startsWith('224.') ||
    ip.startsWith('240.')
  );
}

app.post('/fetch-metadata', async (req, res) => {
  const url: string = req.body.url;

  try {
    const parsedUrl = new URL(url);
    if (!ALLOWLISTED_DOMAINS.includes(parsedUrl.hostname)) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Domain not allowed' });
    }

    const { address } = await dnsLookup(parsedUrl.hostname);
    if (isPrivateIP(address)) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Private IP address not allowed' });
    }

    const response = await axios.get(url, { maxRedirects: 3, validateStatus: null });
    const finalUrl = new URL(response.request.res.responseUrl);
    if (!ALLOWLISTED_DOMAINS.includes(finalUrl.hostname)) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Redirected to a non-allowlisted domain' });
    }

    const root = parse(response.data);
    const title = root.querySelector('title')?.text || 'No title';
    const description = root.querySelector('meta[name="description"]')?.getAttribute('content') || 'No description';

    res.json({ title, description });
  } catch (error) {
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch metadata' });
  }
});

app.listen(3000, () => {
  console.log('Server is running on port 3000');
});
